← All Tours · 3-Day Tour — Son-Kul Classic

Son-Kul Horseback Trek

Kyzart → Kilemche Jailoo → Son-Kul → Kyzart

D1

Kyzart → Kilemche Jailoo

Depart after lunch (or 08:30). Ride through scenic valleys to Kilemche — a summer pasture whose name means "like a carpet." Dinner and overnight in a yurt.

🐎 ~18 km · 4–4.5 h🍽 Lunch + Dinner🏕 Yurt
D2

Kilemche → Son-Kul Lake

Depart 08:00. Cross Tuz-Ashuu Pass (3,400 m) with panoramic views. Ride to the lakeshore and meet a nomadic shepherd family — taste kymyz. Overnight in yurt by the lake.

🐎 ~16 km · 4 h⛰ 3,400 m pass🍽 All meals
D3

Son-Kul → Kyzart

Depart 08:00. Return via Kara-Kyya Pass along scenic mountain ridges and the lakeshore. Lunch on arrival in Kyzart.

🐎 ~23 km · 4 h🍽 Breakfast + Lunch

Option A — Same day start Arrive in Kyzart by 11:00. Have lunch together, then depart around 12:00–13:00.
Option B — Arrive the night before Rest and start fresh in the morning with breakfast. Overnight + dinner: 24 € / person (not included).
